revenue.emptyDescription: Revenue is realised when a booking is completed.

leaderboard.emptyDescription: This ranking appears once these providers start taking bookings.
leaderboard.chartEmptyDescription: These providers have no booking volume to rank, so the chart has nothing to draw.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Patients, providers and administrators
users.count: {count, plural, =0 {No accounts match the current filters} one {# account matching the current filters} other {# accounts matching the current filters}}
users.emptyDescription: Try a different search term, role or status.

confirm.title: Suspend {name}?
confirm.description: They will be signed out and blocked from booking. If this account owns a provider profile, that listing is pulled from search too. You can reactivate them at any time.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Doctors, labs and radiology centers
providers.count: {count, plural, =0 {No providers match the current filters} one {# provider matching the current filters} other {# providers matching the current filters}}
providers.emptyDescription: Try a different search term, type, status or governorate.

pending.banner: {count, plural, one {# provider awaiting approval} other {# providers awaiting approval}}
pending.description: New listings stay hidden from search until you review them.

providers.refunded: {count, plural, =0 {no bookings refunded} one {# booking refunded} other {# bookings refunded}}

toast.hardSuspended: {name} hard-suspended. {count, plural, =0 {No upcoming bookings to cancel} one {# upcoming booking cancelled and refunded} other {# upcoming bookings cancelled and refunded}} — the affected patients have been notified.
toast.softSuspended: {name} soft-suspended. Hidden from search and taking no new bookings; existing bookings are honored.

rejectConfirm.title: Reject {name}?
rejectConfirm.description: The application is declined and the listing stays hidden. You can approve them later if they reapply.

suspend.title: Suspend {name}?
suspend.description: Choose the form of suspension. The two differ in exactly one way that matters: what happens to the patients who have already booked.

soft.title: Soft suspension
soft.impact: Hidden from search and blocked from taking new bookings. Bookings that already exist are honored — patients who booked keep their appointment.

hard.title: Hard suspension
hard.impact: Everything a soft suspension does, and every upcoming booking is cancelled, refunded in full, and the affected patients are notified so they can rebook elsewhere. Use for credential problems or fraud.

suspend.hardWarning: This cancels and refunds every upcoming booking with this provider. It cannot be undone by reinstating them.
suspend.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Medical syndicate registration could not be verified.
suspend.reasonError: Give a reason of at least 10 characters.
suspend.reasonHint: Recorded against the suspension, and used in what the affected patients are told.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.subtitle: Discount codes patients can redeem at checkout
coupons.count: {count, plural, one {# coupon} other {# coupons}} · {active} live right now
coupons.emptyDescription: Create a discount code to run your first promotion.
coupons.tableEmptyDescription: Try a different code or description.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete {code}?
deleteConfirm.description: The code stops working immediately. Bookings that already used it keep their discount. This cannot be undone.

couponDialog.description: Discount codes patients can apply at checkout.

placeholders.description: 25% off your first lab test this summer.

couponDialog.appliesToHint: Leave every box unchecked to apply the coupon to all services.
couponDialog.activeHint: Inactive coupons are rejected at checkout.

validation.codePattern: Letters, numbers, dashes and underscores only.
validation.description: Describe what this coupon is for.

campaignDialog.description: Wallet credit returned to patients after a completed booking.

placeholders.name: Ramadan lab cashback
placeholders.description: Get 10% back as wallet credit on every lab test.

campaignDialog.appliesToHint: Leave every box unchecked to apply the campaign to all services.

validation.name: Give the campaign a name.
validation.capPositive: Set a cap greater than zero.
validation.endAfterStart: The end date must fall after the start date.

cashback.title: Cashback campaigns
cashback.subtitle: Wallet credit returned to patients after a completed booking.
cashback.emptyDescription: Launch a campaign to give patients wallet credit back on their bookings.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete {name}?
deleteConfirm.description: The campaign stops issuing cashback immediately. Credit already issued to patients stays in their wallets. This cannot be undone.

commission.title: Commission rates
commission.description: The share Vesita takes from each completed booking, by provider type. Last updated {date}.
commission.platformFeeHint: A flat fee added to every booking.
commission.vatHint: Charged on the commission and the platform fee.
commission.emptyDescription: The platform has no commission configuration to edit.

example.title: Worked example
example.description: On an {amount} consultation, the platform earns {earns} and the doctor receives {receives}.
example.note: VAT is collected on the platform's fee and commission, and remitted to the tax authority — it is not platform earnings.

across.title: Across provider types
across.description: What the platform takes from an {amount} booking of each type.
